expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text:
Confirmed. Sent email `msg-out-1` to `oncall@acme.io` with subject **"Top error"** and body:

> OOMKilled: Migrate auth to OAuth2 + PKCE

This is the exact title of unresolved Sentry issue **SENTRY-3049**, which has the highest event count at **4,422**.

tool_calls.name: email__send_email
tool_calls.input: {"to":"oncall@acme.io","subject":"Top error","body":"OOMKilled: Migrate auth to OAuth2 + PKCE"}
